## Meeting Purpose

[Final interview with Vivek Shankar for Managing Editor role at fwd.digital](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Vivek brings extensive B2B content marketing expertise, with a focus on technical/financial topics](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [fwd.digital is rapidly growing, offering AI-powered content creation and broader growth services](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [The role involves owning client relationships, delivering high-quality work, and helping scale operations](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Cultural fit and ability to drive client satisfaction are key priorities for the position](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=361.0)

## Topics

### Vivek's Background and Motivation

  - [Based in Lisbon, Portugal for the past year](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Extensive freelance/consulting experience in B2B content marketing, especially fintech](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=207.0)
  - [Sees content marketing evolving beyond just writing, requiring more strategic thinking](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=176.0)
  - [Early adopter of AI tools for content creation, saving significant time](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Excited to take AI usage "to the next level" with fwd.digital's workflows](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

### Vivek's Work Style and Strengths

  - [Described by clients as curious, caring, proactive, and detail-oriented](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=415.0)
  - [Strong at working independently and remotely](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=502.0)
  - [Able to focus intensely for 3-hour blocks](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=971.0)
  - [Recently launched a personal Substack to share ideas](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Comfortable with technical/complex topics, especially in finance](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=272.0)

### Recent Work Example

  - [Created a series of thought leadership blogs for a financial compliance AI company](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Explained complex topics like supervised vs. generative AI models](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=559.0)
  - [Leveraged AI tools to simplify concepts and improve interview questions](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Balanced technical jargon with accessible explanations for the target audience](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=595.0)

### fwd.digital's Business Model and Growth

  - [Started with AI workflow workshops, quickly pivoted to done-for-you services](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1545.0)
  - [Rapid growth: 20 clients, 15 employees, 6-figure deals in 5-6 months](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1639.0)
  - [Offering content creation, strategy, and expanding into broader growth services](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1813.0)
  - [Building repeatable, AI-augmented processes for scalability](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=336.0)

### Role Expectations and Measurement

  - [Goal: Managing Editor to fully own client relationships and results](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)
  - [First 12 weeks critical for learning fwd.digital's approach and systems](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1918.0)
  - [Success metrics: Client satisfaction ("wish I could hire you"), quality of work, strategic thinking](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=2100.0)
  - [Expectation to contribute ideas for improving processes and scaling the business](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=2184.0)

### Team Structure and Support

  - [Researchers available to assist with repetitive tasks](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1896.0)
  - [Network of freelancers (designers, subject matter experts) to tap into](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1955.0)
  - [Leadership (Marcel, Kyle, Jimmy) involved in initial strategy and onboarding](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=1923.0)

## Next Steps

  - [fwd.digital to conduct reference checks](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=2251.0)
  - [Final hiring decisions expected by end of week or early next week](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=2251.0)
  - [Vivek to reach out if any additional questions or information to share](https://fathom.video/share/8PEXzfaK5kZEcmZ8Ejur9ACDW3ip5oEu?tab=summary&timestamp=2292.0)
